      format("woff");

@font-face {
  font-family: Inspire;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-style: normal;
  font-display: swap;
  src: url("https://static-assets.bamgrid.com/fonts/inspire/Inspire-Bold.4ff15ddc93445342649194969715b0b5.woff2")
      format("woff2"),
    url("https://static-assets.bamgrid.com/fonts/inspire/Inspire-Bold.4ff15ddc93445342649194969715b0b5.woff2")
      format("woff");
}
/* *************************************************** */
/* Variables                                           */
/* *************************************************** */
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
  --ot-text-color: #474543;
  --ot-link-color: #0040e5;
  --ot-toggle-bg-color: #008000;
  --ot-toggle-nob-on-color: #fff;
  --ot-button-bg-color: #000000;
  --ot-button-text-color: #fff;
  --ot-border-color: #dcdddf;
  --ot-footer-button-alignment: center;
  --ot-header-font-family: Inspire;
  --ot-body-font-family: Inspire;
  --ot-logo-image-src: url(data:image/png;base64,);
  --ot-logo--display: block;
  --ot-logo-height: 32px;
  --ot-logo-width: 212px;
  --ot-close-icon-background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* DO NOT REMOVE: min-height fix                       */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (min-height: 426px) {
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    min-height: 400px !important;
    max-height: 90% !important;
  }
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* General Styling                                     */
/* *************************************************** */

#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content,
#onetrust-pc-sdk div,
#onetrust-pc-sdk p,
#onetrust-pc-sdk a {
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter a {
  color: var(--ot-link-color);
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header .ot-pc-logo,
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-category-title {
  display: none;
}
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header {
  background-color: #fff;
  border-bottom: none;
  padding-left: 40px;
  padding-top: 36px;
  position: relative;
  width: calc(100% - 63px);
  z-index: 100;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header .ot-pc-logo {
  content: var(--ot-logo-image-src);
  background-position: left;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: 100%;
  display: var(--ot-logo--display);
  height: var(--ot-logo-height);
  width: var(--ot-logo-width);
  /* adjustment for left padding in TWDC logo */
  margin-left: -4px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header #close-pc-btn-handler.ot-close-icon {
  right: 4px;
  top: 32px;
}
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content {
  bottom: 108px;
  margin-left: 40px;
  margin-right: 16px;
  padding-right: 30px;
  top: 16px;
  width: calc(100% - 82px);
  z-index: 1;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content .ot-sdk-row.ot-cat-grp {
  margin-top: 0;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

/* DO NOT CHANGE */
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="1"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="2"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="3"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="4"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="5"],
#accept-recommended-btn-handler {
  display: none !important;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 100px);
  max-width: 550px;
  top: 12px;
  transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) !important;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .pc-logo-container {
  display: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk button {
  font-family: var(--ot-body-font-family);
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .button-theme {
  margin-top: 12px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-footer-logo {
  display: none !important;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h3,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h4,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h5,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h6,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-ven-lst .ot-ven-opts p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-li-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-sel-all-hdr span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-host-lst .ot-host-info,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-fltr-modal #modal-header,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-checkbox label span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-sel-blk p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-lst-title h3,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst .back-btn-handler p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst .ot-ven-name,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-ven-lst .consent-category,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-leg-btn-container .ot-inactive-leg-btn,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-label-status,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-chkbox label span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #clear-filters-handler {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-family: var(--ot-header-font-family);
}

/* close button */
#onetrust-banner-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon,
#ot-sync-ntfy .ot-close-icon {
  background-image: var(--ot-close-icon-background-image) !important;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: 18px 18px;
  height: 44px;
  width: 44px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-item {
  margin-top: 20px;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-item p {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 22px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-title {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 32px;
  margin-top: 70px;
}

.ot-cat-header,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 500;
  line-height: 22px;
}
/* toggle switch */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch {
  height: 32px;
  width: 56px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch-nob {
  border-radius: 16px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-tgl input:checked + .ot-switch .ot-switch-nob {
  background-color: var(--ot-toggle-bg-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-toggle-bg-color);
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch-nob:before {
  bottom: 2px;
  height: 26px;
  width: 26px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-tgl input:checked + .ot-switch .ot-switch-nob:before {
  background-color: var(--ot-toggle-nob-on-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-toggle-nob-on-color);
  right: 23px;
}

/* footer */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-footer {
  border-color: var(--ot-border-color);
}
/* button */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-btn-container {
  text-align: var(--ot-footer-button-alignment);
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter
  button:not(#clear-filters-handler):not(.ot-close-icon):not(#filter-btn-handler):not(.ot-remove-objection-handler):not(
    .ot-obj-leg-btn-handler
  ):not([aria-expanded]):not(.ot-link-btn),
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-leg-btn-container .ot-active-leg-btn {
  background-color: var(--ot-button-bg-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-button-bg-color);
  color: var(--ot-button-text-color);
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter :not(.ot-leg-btn-container) > button:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter button.save-preference-btn-handler {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 40px;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 16px;
  margin-right: 0;
  padding: 16px 31px;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* Mobile Styling                                      */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (max-height: 414px) and (orientation: landscape) {
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    max-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-btn-container {
    margin: 0 16px;
  }
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header {
    width: calc(100% - 64px);
  }
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content {
    padding-right: 16px;
    width: calc(100% - 68px);
  }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 414px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header + #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch {
    top: 0;
  }
}
/* *************************************************** */
/* Desktop Styling                                      */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (min-width: 767px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header + .ot-tgl {
    top: -4px;
  }
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    height: 804px;
    max-width: 760px !important;
  }
}

  outline: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk *:focus-visible {
  outline: 1px solid #000;
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* Variables                                           */
/* *************************************************** */
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
  --ot-text-color: #252526;
  --ot-link-color: #0040e5;
  --ot-toggle-bg-color: #008000;
  --ot-toggle-nob-on-color: #fff;
  --ot-button-bg-color: #000000;
  --ot-button-text-color: #fff;
  --ot-border-color: #dcdddf;
  --ot-footer-button-alignment: center;
  --ot-header-font-family: Inspire;
  --ot-body-font-family: Inspire;
  --ot-logo-image-src: url(data:image/png;base64,);
  --ot-logo--display: block;
  --ot-logo-height: 32px;
  --ot-logo-width: 212px;
  --ot-close-icon-background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* DO NOT REMOVE: min-height fix                       */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (min-height: 426px) {
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    min-height: 400px !important;
    max-height: 90% !important;
  }
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* General Styling                                     */
/* *************************************************** */

#onetrust-pc-sdk #ot-pc-content,
#onetrust-pc-sdk div,
#onetrust-pc-sdk p,
#onetrust-pc-sdk a {
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter a {
  color: var(--ot-link-color);
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header .ot-pc-logo,
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-category-title {
  display: none;
}
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header {
  background-color: #fff;
  border-bottom: none;
  padding-left: 40px;
  padding-top: 36px;
  position: relative;
  width: calc(100% - 63px);
  z-index: 100;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header .ot-pc-logo {
  content: var(--ot-logo-image-src);
  background-position: left;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: 100%;
  display: var(--ot-logo--display);
  height: var(--ot-logo-height);
  width: var(--ot-logo-width);
  /* adjustment for left padding in TWDC logo */
  margin-left: -4px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header #close-pc-btn-handler.ot-close-icon {
  right: 4px;
  top: 32px;
}
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content {
  bottom: 108px;
  margin-left: 40px;
  margin-right: 16px;
  padding-right: 30px;
  top: 16px;
  width: calc(100% - 82px);
  z-index: 1;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content .ot-sdk-row.ot-cat-grp {
  margin-top: 0;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc {
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

/* DO NOT CHANGE */
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="1"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="2"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="3"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="4"],
body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter div.ot-cat-item[data-optanongroupid="5"],
#accept-recommended-btn-handler {
  display: none !important;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
  border-radius: 10px !important;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 100px);
  max-width: 550px;
  top: 12px;
  transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) !important;
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .pc-logo-container {
  display: none;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk button {
  font-family: var(--ot-body-font-family);
}

body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .button-theme {
  margin-top: 12px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-footer-logo {
  display: none !important;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h3,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h4,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h5,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter h6,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-ven-lst .ot-ven-opts p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-li-title,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-sel-all-hdr span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-host-lst .ot-host-info,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-fltr-modal #modal-header,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-checkbox label span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-sel-blk p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-lst-title h3,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst .back-btn-handler p,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst .ot-ven-name,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-lst #ot-ven-lst .consent-category,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-leg-btn-container .ot-inactive-leg-btn,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-label-status,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-chkbox label span,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #clear-filters-handler {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-family: var(--ot-header-font-family);
}

/* close button */
#onetrust-banner-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon,
#ot-sync-ntfy .ot-close-icon {
  background-image: var(--ot-close-icon-background-image) !important;
  background-position: center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  background-size: 18px 18px;
  height: 44px;
  width: 44px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-item {
  margin-top: 20px;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-desc,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-item p {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 22px;
}

#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-title {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 26px;
  font-weight: 600;
  line-height: 32px;
  margin-top: 70px;
}

.ot-cat-header,
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header {
  color: var(--ot-text-color);
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 22px;
}
/* toggle switch */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch {
  height: 32px;
  width: 56px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch-nob {
  border-radius: 16px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-tgl input:checked + .ot-switch .ot-switch-nob {
  background-color: var(--ot-toggle-bg-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-toggle-bg-color);
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch-nob:before {
  bottom: 2px;
  height: 26px;
  width: 26px;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-tgl input:checked + .ot-switch .ot-switch-nob:before {
  background-color: var(--ot-toggle-nob-on-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-toggle-nob-on-color);
  right: 23px;
}

/* footer */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-footer {
  border-color: var(--ot-border-color);
}
/* button */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-btn-container {
  text-align: var(--ot-footer-button-alignment);
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter
  button:not(#clear-filters-handler):not(.ot-close-icon):not(#filter-btn-handler):not(.ot-remove-objection-handler):not(
    .ot-obj-leg-btn-handler
  ):not([aria-expanded]):not(.ot-link-btn),
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-leg-btn-container .ot-active-leg-btn {
  background-color: var(--ot-button-bg-color);
  border-color: var(--ot-button-bg-color);
  color: var(--ot-button-text-color);
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter :not(.ot-leg-btn-container) > button:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter button.save-preference-btn-handler {
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 40px;
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: 16px;
  margin-right: 0;
  padding: 16px 31px;
  text-align: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* *************************************************** */
/* Mobile Styling                                      */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (max-height: 414px) and (orientation: landscape) {
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    max-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
  }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 600px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-btn-container {
    margin: 0 16px;
  }
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-pc-header {
    width: calc(100% - 64px);
  }
  body #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter #ot-pc-content {
    padding-right: 16px;
    width: calc(100% - 68px);
  }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 414px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header + #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-switch {
    top: 0;
  }
}
/* *************************************************** */
/* Desktop Styling                                      */
/* *************************************************** */
@media only screen and (min-width: 767px) {
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-cat-header + .ot-tgl {
    top: -4px;
  }
  #onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter {
    height: 804px;
    max-width: 760px !important;
  }
}

/* Focus Styles */
/* remove all focus indication by default */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon:focus {
  outline: none !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;
}

/* show when tabbed */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter .ot-close-icon:focus-visible {
  outline: 1px solid var(--ot-link-color) !important;
  outline-offset: 4px;
}

/* Submit button size override */
#onetrust-pc-sdk.otPcCenter button.save-preference-btn-handler {
  min-height: 52px !important;
  min-width: 220px !important;
}

.ot-btn-container {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center !important; /* horizontal centering */
  width: 100%;
}
